aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Blow Heating and Air due to a lack of structured data, conversational content, and authority signals.
quick_wins: Add an FAQ section with relevant HVAC questions and answers

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is not optimized and not found, making the business invisible to Google AI.
critical_issues: Missing photos, posts, and Q&A engagement

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms
Expand NAP citations to additional relevant directories

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for maintenance or installation guides

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and authority signals
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local HVAC service queries and maintenance advice
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, partnerships, and detailed service expertise

agency_pitch.hook: Get cited by AI with our AEO strategy tailored for HVAC businesses.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI visibility, Blow Heating and Air misses out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: The business is not found on Google Business Profile and lacks essential schema markup.
agency_pitch.solution: We will optimize your GBP, implement schema markup, and create conversational content to make your business stand out to AI models.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI; the longer you wait, the more market share you lose.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-driven leads for Blow Heating and Air today!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and found significant opportunities to boost your visibility with AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can make your business stand out to AI models and capture more leads.
